content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed the diff (3 changes in src/cli/milestone.rs): (1) handle_bead_history now validates milestone existence before calling load_bead_execution_history, consistent with handle_status/handle_show patterns; (2) handle_tasks similarly adds early milestone validation before load_milestone_task_list; (3) print_bead_execution_history fixes started_at formatting to use .to_rfc3339() matching the already-correct finished_at formatting. All 9 milestone CLI tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings, and fmt check passes. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
